description: Personalized welcome landing page for new clients — intro, what to expect, onboarding checklist, and how to reach you. Plutio's native variables ({{ business.name }}, {{ client.name }}) render server-side.

blocks.textHTML:
Welcome, {{ client.name }} 👋

We're thrilled to be working with you. This page is your home base for our engagement — bookmark it. Below you'll find what to expect over the next few weeks, your onboarding checklist, and how to reach us when you need anything.

What to expect

Our process is built around clarity and momentum. We'll keep weekly check-ins short, send you a written recap after every meeting, and make sure you always know what's coming next. No surprises, no scope creep.

Your first two weeks look like this:

  • Week 1: Discovery call, intake form, kickoff session.
  • Week 2: First deliverable preview and your feedback loop established.

Your onboarding checklist

  • ☐ Review and sign the service agreement
  • ☐ Complete the intake form (we'll send the link)
  • ☐ Schedule the kickoff call
  • ☐ Share brand assets (logos, fonts, colors, photography)
  • ☐ Add us to your calendar for weekly check-ins

How to reach us

Day-to-day questions: reply to any email from {{ business.name }} or message us in this Plutio portal. We respond within one business day.

Urgent / time-sensitive: call our main line during business hours. Off-hours emergencies — we'll share a direct number after kickoff.
